item.title: 1/? Kitana from Mortal Kombat 9
item.description: “Kitana wins, flawless victory” 1/? ? Kitana from Mortal Kombat 9 I didn’t expect to launch on a Tuesday with the sexiest costume of the season, but the show must go on lol. I promise they’re not all this saucy. Happy #josephinehalloween2k24

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Tuesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
yes
i guess
for when you want to get extreme
it's a nice name
i like him
lava
wait what's wrong with Lois??
thank mr skeltal
kinda weird
is it though?
perfection
weird i don't remember those scenes at all
mmm hmm
nah that's a cookie
dang
if you don't have one, yes you do because uncle cel is your friend
that's all for me, have a great night gang!!

item.title: Choose wisely
item.dc:creator: Machi4vel

item.title: Memes vol 258 faves
item.description:
Here’s another installment of my favorite memes
I made this one and it’s the greatest thing I’ve ever created. I made is after I realized my music library just consisted of all 4
PLEASE CAN THEY DO THIS!!!! And to answer the questions I always get with AO3- it stands for archive of our own, a fanfiction site that has everything- seriously look up your favorite characters- they will be having sex on AO3
*weeping*
This might be my favorite image not taken by me of all time. If someone could find sauce- no maybe I don’t want to know
Newsies! What about Newsies!! But Cabaret slaps and all the others actually but I’ve never seen my fair lady actually
Nessie is quite loud
*sobbing*
STOP LOOK AT HIS LITTLE FACE NOOOOO TAKE THEM YOU HEATHEN
RAAAAAGHHHHH MIKE FAIST GUYS I DONT MEAN TO GATEKEEP OR ANYTHING BUT HIS FIRST EVER PROFESSIONAL ACTING GIG WAS NEWSIES ON BROADWAY WHERE HE UNDERSTUDIED JEREMY FRICKIN JORDAN AND HE THINKS HE CANT SING- imagine being able to sing so well that you understudy JEREMY JORDAN in NEWSIES singing SANTA FE and you have the AUDACITY to think you can’t sing- SIR PLEASE sorry I’m capitalizing like Greg Heffley but I’m very passionate about Mike Faist- I think he’s so hot but my boyfriend and everyone I’ve ever shown (the both of them together) thinks he looks like my dad- so you win this round Freud I guess :( ALSO HE LOVES TAP DANCING!! And he was so good in West Side Story https://youtu.be/9MaDKTexdgk?si=ZQS8cGTnKy19L4Ca LISTEN YOU GUYS
Whenever my boyfriend plays Marvin Gaye, I say “Marvin Gaye’s clueless ass” and it brings me endless entertainment
NEWSIES IS SO HIGH UP!! It’s 3!
My friend had a cat named Missy, short for Missile Launcher
Corey Cott! And Ben Fankhauser!!
Liza Jane tax
Froggy tax
Nessie tax
Scruffy tax

item.title: John Amos Dies: ‘Good Times’, ‘Roots’ Actor Was 84
item.description: John Amos, the actor whose characters in Good Times, Roots and The Mary Tyler Moore Show lent the 1970s a solid share of its too-few portrayals of strong Black male role models, died August 21 in Los Angeles of natural causes. He was 84. His death, announced by son Kelly Christopher Amos, had not been disclosed until today. “It is with heartfelt sadness that I share with you that my father has transitioned,” Kelly Christopher Amos said in a statement. “He was a man with the kindest heart and a heart of gold… and he was loved the world over. Many fans consider him their TV father. He lived a good life. His legacy will live on in his outstanding works in television and film as an actor
item.dc:creator: meatballdreamer

item.title: I know it's late and Imgur will be flooded by the debate but I wanted to share my October 1st witchy outfit I wore to work.
item.description: I'm obsessed with this purse and will wear it everyday this month. I was the only one at work dressed up to usher in October. It was an awesome even if exhausting work day on my feet. But witches know how to get shit done. Hope you all can excuse my obvious selfies but I was feeling really happy today and in love with my thrown together outfit. Have a wonderful October, everyone!
item.dc:creator: princesscindycat
